zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester於1398年2月24日出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾瑪爾 洛其時，她的父親George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus22歲，母親Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus11395歲。她於1413年10月與Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特吉福德享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester于1398年2月24日出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾瑪爾 洛其时，她的父亲George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus22岁，母亲Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus11395岁。她于1413年10月与Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特吉福德享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester was born on 24 February 1398, in Mar Lodge, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus, was 22 and her mother, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, was 11395. She married Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes in October 1413, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1458, in Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland,: Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester est née le 24 février 1398, à Mar Lodge, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, avait 11395 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes en octobre 1413, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1458, à Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester am 24. Februar 1398 in Mar Lodge, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus 22 und ihre Mutter Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus 11395. Sie hat im Oktober 1413 in Scotland Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester è nata il il 24 febbraio 1398 nel Mar Lodge, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, aveva 11395 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes nel ottobre 1413, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1458, nel Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yesterが1398年2月24日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアマー ロッジで生まれた時，父George Douglas 1st Earl of Angusは22歳，母Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angusは11395歳であった。1413年10月にスコットランドでAlexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンイエスターギフォードで60歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 지퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester(이)가 1398년 2월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 마 로지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus(은)는 11395세였다. 그녀는 1413년 10월 스컷랜드에서 Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 지퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester nasceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1398, em Mar Lodge, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, tinha 11395 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes em outubro de 1413, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1458, em Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland,: гиффорд, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester родилась 24 февраля 1398 г. в местности мар лодж, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, 11395. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes октябрь 1413 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1458 г. в местности гиффорд, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes en octubre de 1413, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1458, en Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
